daily_key_contract.rationale: This key is unique in baseline and local daily surfaces. It yields 13470 extra keys and 1 missing key, exactly explaining the net surplus of 13469 rows.

hypotheses.title: Seleccion incorrecta de latest batch por source
evidence: v_cg_latest_batch_by_source selected one latest batch per source: KPIONE 19, KPIONE2 38, POWER_APP 26.
Extra rows come from dates inside those latest batches, not from selecting multiple raw batches.

hypotheses.title: Ventana acumulativa de raw reconstruida como si fuera incremental
evidence: Latest raw batches are accumulative/mixed and contain dates before the product daily baseline window.
All 13470 extra keys are before 2026-05-11.
Applying fecha_visita >= 2026-05-11 reduces local daily from 34817 to 21347 and removes all extra keys.
hypotheses.experimental_change: Filter local daily reconstruction to the observed productive daily window fecha_visita >= 2026-05-11.

hypotheses.title: Divergencia en seleccion de ruta_batch_id
evidence: The surplus itself is fixed by the date/window correction, not by ruta batch changes.
Remaining route attribute differences concentrate in week 2026-06-01.
Baseline route attributes match ruta_batch 16/17 far better than local ruta_batch 18 for that week.
hypotheses.experimental_change: Override week 2026-06-01 route attributes with ruta_batch 16 in a local-only surface.
hypotheses.result_after_change: value_differences drop from 1227 to 56 after route16 dedup, with rows=21347, extra_keys=0, missing_keys=1.

hypotheses.title: Multiplicacion en v_rr_frecuencia_base_resuelta_v2
evidence: The real daily key has duplicate_keys=0 in both baseline and initial local surfaces.
A naive route16 override created 11 duplicate keys, but current local daily did not.
hypotheses.experimental_change: No production change; keep route duplicate handling gated separately.
hypotheses.result_after_change: No evidence that route multiplication caused the 13469 net surplus.

hypotheses.title: Diferencias por payload_json versus columnas fisicas
evidence: The local DDL intentionally reads some KPIONE and POWER_APP fields from payload_json.
The surplus is date-window bounded and disappears when the pre-2026-05-11 dates are removed.
hypotheses.experimental_change: No payload rewrite in this phase.
hypotheses.result_after_change: Payload differences remain a compatibility risk, not the demonstrated surplus cause.

hypotheses.title: SP Item ID fisico NULL en KPIONE2 y valor presente solo en payload
evidence: kpione2_raw rows=526022; physical sp_item_id NULL in 526022; payload SP Item ID present in 526022.
Latest KPIONE2 batch 38 rows=45736; physical sp_item_id NULL in all, payload value present in all.
Daily key and surplus do not use SP Item ID.
hypotheses.experimental_change: None for daily root cause; preserve payload_json dependency.
hypotheses.result_after_change: Confirms payload_json cannot be removed, but does not explain daily surplus.

hypotheses.title: DDL local no corresponde exactamente a la definicion productiva
evidence: DDL hashes were recorded and applied from 9C7A4 evidence.
Local required v2 views exist, but 10 legacy views failed due absent historical dependencies.
The local daily checkpoint used cg_core.v_cg_visita_dia_resuelta_v2, while the productive daily fact contract aligns with cg_core.v_cg_visita_dia_precedencia_v2 plus mart_loaded_at.
hypotheses.experimental_change: Use v_cg_visita_dia_precedencia_v2 for the local daily parity surface.
hypotheses.result_after_change: Semantic columns align better, but parity still has 1 missing key and 1227 value differences before route correction.

hypotheses.title: Dependencia o filtro omitido durante la reconstruccion local
evidence: Productive daily baseline starts at 2026-05-11 while local daily view includes 2026-04-27 and 2026-05-04.
Filtering to the productive daily window removes all extra keys.
hypotheses.experimental_change: Add the productive affected-date/window contract to the local reconstruction.

hypotheses.title: Diferencia temporal entre batch raw y snapshot RUTA_RUTERO
evidence: Week 2026-06-01 route attributes in baseline match ruta_batch 16/17, while local reconstruction uses mostly ruta_batch 18.
Route16 dedup experiment reduces value differences from 1227 to 56.
hypotheses.experimental_change: Use the route snapshot that was effective for the productive weekly/daily materialization, not the later local latest-week snapshot.
hypotheses.result_after_change: Still not parity-closed: 1 missing key and 56 value differences remain.

experiments.description: Compare baseline and initial local daily using fecha_visita + cod_rt + cliente_norm.
Use cg_core.v_cg_visita_dia_precedencia_v2 with the same daily window.
Local-only override of week 2026-06-01 route attributes with deduped ruta_batch 16.
CREATE TABLE from cg_mart.v_cg_out_weekly_v2 for SEMANA_INICIO=2026-05-11.

dominant_plan_nodes: Subquery Scan/Aggregate total cost 161292 for one-week filtered query
Sort + WindowAgg over v_cg_evento_scope_v2 before week filter can finish
Append over latest raw source branches with computed date/week expressions
Hash Join from raw evidence to route frequency base
Sorted Aggregate with string_agg(DISTINCT ...) in weekly grouping
index_candidates_local_only: Materialize daily precedence/event scope before weekly aggregation in local parity surface
Expression or generated-column indexes for raw report_week_start/date and normalized cliente/cod_rt candidates
Composite local indexes on event_scope/precomputed daily: semana_inicio, cod_rt, cliente_norm
Route frequency surface indexed by effective_week_start, cod_rt, cliente_norm, ruta_batch_id
Avoid querying cg_mart.v_cg_out_weekly_v2 directly for parity; use staged daily and route surfaces
weekly.explain_analyze: One-week EXPLAIN ANALYZE timed out at 300s; one-week CREATE TABLE timed out at 180s; full materialization previously timed out at 900s.

root_cause: The net daily surplus is caused by reconstructing daily rows from complete latest raw snapshots over dates 2026-04-27..2026-05-10, while the productive daily baseline is materialized only from 2026-05-11 onward. This omitted productive affected-date/window contract explains 13470 extra local keys, offset by one missing baseline key. Weekly exceeds 900s because the local weekly view recomputes event_scope from raw and route views with WindowAgg/Sort/Hash Join before the week filter can finish, rather than using a precomputed daily/mart surface.
next_gate: G0 remains open: resolve the one missing KPIONE2 key on 2026-05-15, define the authoritative route snapshot policy for week 2026-06-01, then rebuild weekly from staged daily/route surfaces before any storage or retention work.
